title: Damaged/Missing/Faulty Response Template
body_template:
Hi [Customer Name],

Thank you so much for your message.

That's certainly not how your order should have arrived. If you're able to send through a couple of photos of what you received, I'll take a look straight away and organise the correct replacement parts for you.

We'll get this sorted as quickly as possible.

Warm regards,
Heidi x
body_template_alt_1:
Hi [Customer Name],

Thank you so much for your message.

That's certainly not how your order should have arrived. If you're able to send through a few photos of the affected Boxes, I'll review them straight away and organise the best resolution for you.

Thank you again for reaching out.

Warm regards,
Heidi x
body_template_alt_2:
Hi [Customer Name],

Thank you so much for sending that through.

Before I send a replacement piece, I just want to make completely sure I'm sending the correct side. When you're facing the front of the Stand as shown, can you please confirm that you have [incorrect part received] and that it's the [missing correct part] that is missing.

I just want to triple-check so we get this right first time and you're not waiting any longer than necessary.

Warm regards,
Heidi x
tone_notes: Empathetic, action-oriented, warm. Acknowledge the issue immediately. Ask for photos. Reassure resolution. Never defensive.

title: Shipping/Delivery Response Template
body_template:
Hi [Customer Name],

That's absolutely no problem at all.

I can hold your order and arrange dispatch closer to your return date so everything arrives when you're ready. Just let me know the timing that suits you best and I'll make a note of it for you.

Warm regards,
Heidi x
body_template_alt_1:
Hi [Customer Name],

Thank you so much for your message.

We don't currently offer a click-and-collect option, as our Sydney warehouse isn't set up for customer pickups — all orders are shipped directly from there.

If there's anything else I can help with in the meantime, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Warm regards,
Heidi x
body_template_alt_2:
Hi [Customer Name],

I hope you're having a lovely week.

The Stands are simple to assemble, but as we're doing some local deliveries, I'd be more than happy to organise to have your Stand delivered assembled. The only catch is that someone would need to be home to receive it, as it obviously won't be packaged.

Please let me know whether [Day Option 1] or [Day Option 2] suits you better, or if either day is fine.

Warm regards,
Heidi x
tone_notes: Accommodating, practical, warm. Lead with the solution. Never make the customer feel like an inconvenience.

title: Product Usage Response Template
body_template:
Hi [Customer Name],

Thank you so much for your message.

The first thing to note is that the Sagitine Boxes are designed as storage boxes, not drawers. They sit within the frame rather than on runners, which allows you to remove, reorganise, and protect your pieces more effectively over time.

Because of this, they are intentionally a more considered interaction. Many customers find it becomes very natural quite quickly, particularly when using two hands to open the Boxes.

I hope that context is helpful, and of course please reach out if you have any other questions.

Warm regards,
Heidi x
body_template_alt_1:
Hi [Customer Name],

Thank you so much for your message.

I wouldn't recommend gluing or adhering the Boxes in place. Any form of adhesion can damage them quite significantly because of their paper-based, hand-wrapped construction.

The Boxes are designed as storage boxes rather than drawers, so they are intended to be removed from the Stand for access and organisation.

I hope that helps, and I'm always happy to answer any other questions.

Warm regards,
Heidi x
body_template_alt_2:
Hi [Customer Name],

Thank you so much for your message.

I use several sets every day myself, and I tend to use two hands to open the Boxes, often popping whatever I'm holding on top while I do it. It becomes very natural quite quickly.

Because the Boxes are designed as storage boxes rather than drawers, that slightly more deliberate interaction is part of how they protect and organise your pieces over time.

I hope that's helpful.

Warm regards,
Heidi x
tone_notes: Educational, patient, personal. Always clarify the storage box vs drawer distinction. First-person usage anecdotes work well. Never make the customer feel silly for asking.

title: Pre-Purchase/Product Clarification Response Template
body_template:
Hi [Customer Name],

Thank you so much for your message. I completely understand wanting to get it assembled right away.

You'll find your assembly instructions attached.

We also email our instructions ahead of delivery as many of our customers like to have everything ready to go, but don't worry at all if you didn't see that one come through. It's a really simple setup — you'll just need an Allen key and a screwdriver.

You can also find all our instruction guides anytime on our website with the product information, just in case you ever need them again.

If you run into any trouble at all, please reach out. I'm more than happy to help.

Warm regards,
Heidi x
body_template_alt_1:
Hi [Customer Name],

That's a great question.

The Sagitine Boxes are designed as storage boxes, not drawers. They sit within the frame rather than on runners, which means they can be removed completely for access, organisation, and rearranging.

That design is very intentional and is part of what makes the system feel both practical and considered.

Please let me know if you'd like help choosing the right configuration for your space.

Warm regards,
Heidi x
body_template_alt_2:
Hi [Customer Name],

Thank you so much for your message.

Our Inserts are designed to sit within the relevant Sagitine Box format rather than function as standalone pieces. They're intended to help organise specific items within the broader storage system.

If you'd like, I'm very happy to guide you to the best option depending on what you're hoping to store.

Warm regards,
Heidi x
tone_notes: Helpful, guiding, warm. Anticipate follow-up questions. Offer to assist further. Encourage confidence in their purchase decision.

title: Return/Refund/Exchange Response Template
body_template:
Hi [Customer Name],

Thank you for your message.

That's absolutely fine. I'll arrange your refund back to the same payment method used for your order. It typically takes around 3 business days to appear, although some banks can take up to 10.

Please just confirm that you're happy for me to process it that way.

Warm regards,
Heidi x
body_template_alt_1:
Hi [Customer Name],

Thank you for your message.

I'll organise your refund back to the original payment method used for the order. That typically takes around 3 business days, though some banks do allow up to 10.

For collection, I'll just need to confirm whether the Stand is disassembled and whether you still have the original packaging, as that will determine the most suitable pickup method.

Once I have that, I'll take care of the rest.

Warm regards,
Heidi x
body_template_alt_2:
Hi [Customer Name],

That's no trouble at all.

There is no need to return the damaged Boxes. If you're able to find another use for them, that would be lovely, and if not, please feel free to recycle them.

I'll arrange the refund to the same payment method used for your order once confirmed.

Warm regards,
Heidi x
tone_notes: Frictionless, reassuring, clear. Lead with yes. State the timeline. Ask only what is necessary. Never make the customer feel they need to justify the return.

title: Stock Availability Response Template
body_template:
Hi [Customer Name],

Thank you so much for your message.

At the moment, we don't have plans to offer that piece separately. Our pieces are designed as complete systems, which is where they really perform at their best.

I would recommend staying subscribed to our emails, as we always notify there first if anything changes.

Warm regards,
Heidi x
body_template_alt_1:
Hi [Customer Name],

Thank you so much for your message.

The [Product Name] is such a timelessly chic piece.

We're expecting it to be back in stock around [Month/Date], and as soon as it's available for pre-order, it will be live on our website.

If you're signed up to our emails, you'll receive a notification the moment it's available.

I hope that helps, and please don't hesitate to reach out if you have any other questions.

Warm regards,
Heidi x
body_template_alt_2:
Hi [Customer Name],

Thank you so much for your message.

We do occasionally assist with Stand-only requests, but in most cases the complete set offers much better overall value.

If you'd still like me to look into Stand-only pricing for you, I'd be very happy to do that. Otherwise, I'm also happy to guide you to the most suitable full configuration depending on what you already have.

Warm regards,
Heidi x
tone_notes: Warm, honest, product-proud. Give a clear answer. Point toward emails/waitlist. Never overpromise on timelines.

title: Partnership/Wholesale/Press Response Template
body_template:
Hi [Customer Name],

Thank you so much for reaching out — I really appreciate you thinking of Sagitine.

At the moment, we're being quite selective with partnerships and focusing on a smaller number of very aligned collaborations, so we won't be moving forward this time.

That said, I'd absolutely love to stay in touch for future opportunities.

Warm regards,
Heidi x
body_template_alt_1:
Hi [Customer Name],

Thank you so much for taking the time to apply. I really appreciate your interest in Sagitine.

We've exhausted our gifting allocation for this round, so we won't be moving forward this time, but please do keep an eye out for future opportunities.

Warm regards,
Heidi x
tone_notes: Gracious, selective, warm. Always decline kindly and leave the door open. Never ignore or give a cold no.

title: Brand Feedback/General Response Template
body_template:
Hi [Customer Name],

Thank you so much for your message — it genuinely means so much to hear.

I'm so glad you're enjoying your pieces.

Warm regards,
Heidi x
body_template_alt_1:
Hi [Customer Name],

Thank you again for your lovely message — it honestly made my day.

If you ever have a spare minute, I'd be so grateful if you'd leave a quick review. It really helps a small brand like ours, and your experience goes a long way in helping others choose the right piece for their home.

You can leave a review here: [Insert Review Link]

Absolutely no pressure at all — only if you feel up to it.

Warm regards,
Heidi x
tone_notes: Genuine, warm, personal. Keep it brief. Don't over-formalise positive feedback responses. The review request alt is appropriate when the sentiment is particularly strong.
